title: Nippon Ant Killer Liquid Insect Control, Suitable For Use Indoors And Outdoors, Kills Ants & Their Entire Colony, Usable With Bait Station Or Standalone - 25G
features: • Worker ants carry the bait back to the nest
• Useful where the nest site is unknown
description: From the brand Previous page Who Are Nippon? The iconic name in ant and insect control, derives its name from the outside marking stamp on the wooden crates in which it was delivered to the company from Japan in the 1960s. The name NIPPON displayed the country of origin, meaning JAPAN What makes our products unique? From pre baited ant stations to ready to use liquids, our range is truly versatile, ensuring you can remove pests from your home and garden in a quick, safe manner. Are our products high quality? 60 years of history and over 21,000 4* and above reviews on Amazon are testament to quality of our product range Shop Our Range ANT CONTROL Our range of ant control products allows you dispatch ant infestations with ease. From ant bait stations which get rid of a full colony, to instant kill liquids and sprays, we have your ant control needs in order. Shop Ant Control FLYING INSECT CONTROL Flying pests are an ever present nuisance during the summer months. Our range of flying pest products will help make life a little easier. From rogue flies to wasp nest infestations, our range of sprays and foams allow you to dispatch flying insects (and their nests) safely and with ease. Shop Flying Insect Control RODENT CONTROL Rodents are pretty high on a lot of peoples fear lists and are renowned for spreading disease. Our range of mouse/rat traps & baits help you to keep your home rodent free year round. Shop Rodent Control Next page
